tweet.text:
It’s that time again! Shooting it straight season 2 with a twist!
Live shows every Monday nights at 8 EST starting tomorrow! Tune in and come hang out! @InsideCarolina
RT @InsideCarolina: This season's first episode of Shooting it Straight Live with @JJacks_44 debuted last night with his initial thoughts o…
Back at it at 8 EST for shooting it straight! Tune in! @InsideCarolina
Exciting things to watch for tonight! https://t.co/ZDq5cBwmLp
